# 📦 Pull Request Title

> Use an informative title with context. Examples:   
> - feat(auth): add JWT-based login
> - fix(ui): resolve input focus issue on Safari

## 📝 Summary

> Briefly explain WHAT this PR does and WHY.   
> Focus on the problem you're solving or the feature you're adding.

---

## 📂 Type of Change

> Please delete options that are not relevant and mark the chosen one with an `x`.

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (adds new functionality)
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor (non-breaking code change that improves structure)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation only
- [ ] 🧪 Test coverage improvement
- [ ] 🎨 Code style / formatting
- [ ] 🚀 CI/CD pipeline changes
- [ ] 🧹 Chore (tooling or config)
- [ ] ⚡️ Performance optimization
- [ ] 🗑 Revert
- [ ] 🧱 Build system / dependency changes

---

## ✅ Checklist

> Ensure the following tasks are completed

- [ ] My branch is named following: `<type>/<short-description>`
- [ ] I’ve followed the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines
- [ ] Code follows the project’s coding style and conventions
- [ ] I’ve tested my changes in the intended environments
- [ ] I’ve added or updated tests if needed
- [ ] I’ve added or updated documentation as needed
- [ ] No sensitive data (e.g., keys, tokens) is included
- [ ] This PR targets the correct base branch (`master`, `develop`, etc.)

---

## 🔗 Related Issues (if applicable)

> List issues closed or referenced. Example:   
> - Closes #123
> - Fixes #45
> - Related to #123

---

## 🧪 Test Plan

> Briefly describe how this was tested or add test instructions

- Manual test cases performed:
  - [ ] Example: logged in as user role and confirmed behavior
- Automated test coverage:
  - [ ] Existing tests updated
  - [ ] New tests added

---

## 🧨 Breaking Changes

> If this change breaks existing functionality, explain what and why

- [ ] Yes (explain below)
- [ ] No

---

## 📸 Screenshots or Videos (Optional)

> Add screenshots or gifs to demonstrate UI/UX changes.

---

## Notes for Reviewers

> Additional context, known issues, or areas to focus on during review.
